components.value: V, S, M (a piece of clay)

description.value: When you cast this spell, you merge with an adjacent natural stone surface, forming a 5-foot pocket within. If the stone surface does not have enough volume to safely contain a 5-foot sphere of empty space, the spell fails. When created, there is sufficient air within the pocket for up to one Medium creature to survive for the spellâs duration, including one additional Tiny or smaller creature, such as a familiar. At the end of the spellâs duration, you are immediately expelled into the nearest available open space adjacent to the surface you merged with.
